body:
After https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl/pull/41 many spherical geometry related methods were moved into CubedSphere.jl v0.3.3. So until they are removed from Oceananigans we can't be using CubedSphere v0.3.3 or later since then they both define the same methods and Julia uses none of them?

cc @siddharthabishnu
title: Update CubedSphere version range in Project.toml
